events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Given that the submitted package is missing the quantity takeoff and area count needed to verify scope, I classified this as `needs_more_info` rather than pass/fail — the photos show rough-complete panelboard work with no visually confirmed defects, but without the takeoff data it's not possible to verify full compliance with Art. 408, 110.26, and 200.4 across the entire scope, or to accurately state percent complete.
